summary: Renders a 3D scene from a Camera COMP, Geometry COMPs, and Light COMPs into a 2D texture. The primary bridge between 3D and 2D workflows.

key_params.name: camera
key_params.note: Path to the Camera COMP used for rendering

key_params.name: geometry
key_params.note: Path(s) to Geometry COMPs to render (space-separated or wildcard)

key_params.name: lights
key_params.note: Path(s) to Light COMPs (space-separated or wildcard)

key_params.name: renderpulse
key_params.note: 2025.30000+: pulse to render once on demand instead of every cook

key_params.name: bgcolor
key_params.note: 2025.30000+: built-in background color (replaces stacking a Constant TOP behind)

key_params.name: uvunwrappop
key_params.note: 2025.30000+: optional UV Unwrap POP input for UV-baking workflows

common_gotchas: An empty Geometry or Camera parameter produces a black output with no error — always verify paths.
Render is GPU-intensive at high resolutions; use instancing in Geometry COMPs rather than duplicating geometry.
If you don't need camera or light control, the new Render Simple TOP (2025.30000+) is a lighter-weight alternative.
2025.30000+: now natively supports rendering to 3D textures and 2D arrays — see the texture-format params.
